name: Bone Gladiator King
lore_text:
Bone Gladiator King — Major-Bosses of Eye/Wind Duality.
A super presence whose choices bend the battlefield toward fate.
Iconography: Eye/Wind sigils, attire marked by duty.
mechanics_text:
Heroic Initiative (9)
🛡️ Guard 3 • ⚔️ First Strike 7
Acts early; +1 range on the opening turn; On attack, peek the top of an enemy deck; End step: pay 1 supply or take 2 recoil.
• Count resources; burst then rotate.
• Pair with allies that cover your weakest stat.
• Trade only when your initiative window is open.
